stemHtml: The following is an example for error generation in the cockpit caused by economics:

options.a: A company within which the highest value is placed with passenger comfort, even at the expense of flight safety.
options.b: A company culture that calls for maximisation of payload by generally abandoning the carriage of extra fuel.
options.c: Night curfew on the home base which requires short turn-arounds to be made to complete the planned flights.
options.d: An airline within which most employees come from closed-culture countries.
